_comment: Reference values produced by DELPHES' OWN evaluator (DelphesFormula, a TFormula subclass) inside scailfin/delphes-python-centos:3.5.0, for the b-tagging efficiency formulas of the CMS_PhaseII_0PU card. Frozen here so the analytic suite can check accsim's evaluator against the authority without needing Docker. Regenerate with the procedure in docs/CONVENTIONS.md -> b-tagging efficiency.
